title: tarenna supra-axillaris
intro: Tarenna supra-axillaris, also known as Himalayan Tarenna, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Tarenna supra-axillaris include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of digestive problems. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
